sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17870" key="au)topoi/htos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτο-ποίητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n17870.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">αὐτοπαγής</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0524.tlg001:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sophr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
